examples: Gradually the wrath faded out of the old King's face, and he said, "Kiss me, my prince."
There was silence while one might count ten--the master was gathering his wrath.
Sing Goddess the wrath of Achilles.
Our God is a loving god, but he is also a god of wrath and anger.
Coke and Pepsi are hardly the first to face the wrath of disgruntled citizens.
